title: Mecodium whitei
taxonomy: Mecodium whitei is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants for support. Mecodium whitei is native to Australia and New Guinea. The classification of Mecodium whitei is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Dryopteridaceae, genus Mecodium, and species M. whitei. Mecodium whitei is closely related to other species in the Dryopteridaceae family.
